parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, reply_text: $json.fixed_reply, handled_at: new Date().toISOString(), llm_provider: null, llm_status: 'not_called', used_final_fallback: false } }];

const log = {
  event: 'gym_buddy_mvp_message',
  channel: $json.channel,
  user_id: $json.user_id,
  chat_id: $json.chat_id,
  username: $json.username,
  message_id: $json.message_id,
  message_type: $json.message_type,
  message_text: $json.message_text,
  intent: $json.intent,
  risk_level: $json.risk_level,
  route: $json.route,
  requires_llm: $json.requires_llm,
  primary_llm_status: $json.primary_llm_status,
  llm_provider: $json.llm_provider,
  llm_model: $json.llm_model ?? null,
  llm_status: $json.llm_status,
  llm_error_code: $json.llm_error_code ?? null,
  llm_error_message: $json.llm_error_message ?? null,
  fallback_reason: $json.fallback_reason,
  used_final_fallback: $json.used_final_fallback,
  reply_text: $json.reply_text,
  received_at: $json.received_at,
  handled_at: $json.handled_at
};
console.log('GYM_BUDDY_TECH_LOG ' + JSON.stringify(log));
return [{ json: { ...$json, technical_log: log } }];
